overview: GVR and S College of Engineering and Technology (GVR&S), established in 2007, is a private engineering institution located in Guntur, Andhra Pradesh. The college was founded with the vision of providing technical education to students in rural and semi-urban areas. It is known for its discipline-centric learning environment and its efforts to bridge the gap between academic education and industry requirements in the Guntur region.
accreditation: Approved by AICTE, New Delhi. Affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada (JNTUK). Accredited by NAAC.

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, AI&DS, ECE, EEE, Civil, Mechanical)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM + AP EAPCET rank

coursesAndFees.course: MBA (General, HR, Finance, Marketing, Agribusiness, etc.)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: Graduation with 50% aggregate + AP ICET rank

coursesAndFees.course: M.Tech (CSE, Digital Electronics & Communication, VLSI, Power Systems, CAD/CAM)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: B.E./B.Tech with 50% aggregate + GATE / AP PGECET score

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are strictly merit-based. 70% of seats (Category A) are filled via state-level web counseling (APSCHE) based on entrance exam ranks. 30% are Management Quota (Category B) seats filled based on institutional merit or qualifying scores. Counseling Code: GVRS.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAPCET 2026: May 12–18, 2026; AP ICET 2026 Rank Card: May 16, 2026; B.Tech Counseling: July 2026; AP POLYCET Result: May 10, 2026.

facilities: Central Library with 4,000+ volumes and Digital Access (SOUL 2.0)
On-campus Separate Hostels for Boys and Girls
Transportation (Fleet covering Guntur and surrounding towns)
campus.specialNote: The campus is designed to be eco-friendly and provides a peaceful environment for rural students. It emphasizes skill-building workshops and regular guest lectures to ensure students are prepared for global competition.

contact.address: GVR&S Campus, Near Budampadu, Guntur, Andhra Pradesh - 522017
